steps.notes: packages/ui STATUS_META and STATUS_LABEL both updated with 'rejected' entry. tsc --noEmit exits 0.
drizzle/0005_add_rejected_order_status.sql applied cleanly. SQL is standalone ALTER TYPE order_status ADD VALUE 'rejected' — no transaction block (confirmed by reading generated file).
order-state-machine.ts is pure; no DB import; canTransition and isTerminal exported correctly.

steps.step: Section C+D: staff.ts PATCH + GET /completed typecheck
steps.notes: All route handlers, zod schemas, and stub functions typecheck clean.

steps.step: Section E: mobile API layer typecheck (staff files only)
steps.notes: No errors in staff-api.ts, use-update-order-status.ts, use-completed-orders.ts. Pre-existing unrelated errors (expo-maps, expo-location, @gorhom/bottom-sheet) are not introduced by this change.
pending→accepted (200, estimatedReadyAt non-null), accepted→preparing, preparing→flavoring, flavoring→ready, ready→completed, pending→cancelled all return 200 with correct status.
pending→ready, accepted→ready (skip states), completed→cancelled (terminal source), cancelled→pending (terminal source) all return 409.

steps.step: AC-3: branch isolation — cross-branch PATCH → 403; unassigned → 403
steps.notes: Branch-1 staff cannot PATCH branch-2 order (returns 403, DB order unchanged). Unassigned staff → 403.
pending→rejected returns 200. Subsequent PATCH on rejected order returns 409.

steps.step: AC-5: GET /orders/completed returns only assigned-branch terminal orders
steps.notes: Branch-1 completed/cancelled/rejected included. Branch-1 pending excluded. Branch-2 completed excluded. Unassigned staff → 403.

steps.step: AC-6: ETA set from branch default at accept time; etaMinutes body ignored
steps.notes: estimated_ready_at is within ±5s of (now() at PATCH time) + (branch.estimated_prep_minutes * 60s). Body etaMinutes=999 is accepted but ignored.

steps.step: Full test suite — all 84 tests across 11 test files
steps.notes: 11 test files, 84 tests, 0 failures. Existing test suites (staff-orders, require-staff, orders, auth, branches, smoke) all pass — no regressions.
